task_completion.description: Create a Box primitive in the Part workbench
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Box' object should be visible in the Tree View (Model tab) on the left side of the screen, and a 3D box should appear in the main 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: Set the Box Length to 60 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Property View (Data tab) at the bottom left, with the Box selected, the 'Length' property should be set to '60.00 mm'.

task_completion.description: Set the Box Width to 40 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Property View (Data tab) at the bottom left, with the Box selected, the 'Width' property should be set to '40.00 mm'.

task_completion.description: Set the Box Height to 25 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Property View (Data tab) at the bottom left, with the Box selected, the 'Height' property should be set to '25.00 mm'.

task_completion.description: Save the document as box_model.FCStd in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' and the filename 'box_model.FCStd', OR the main FreeCAD window title/tab updating to show 'box_model' or 'box_model.FCStd'.

integrity.description: Agent used the FreeCAD GUI to create and modify the box
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and the property editor, rather than typing Python scripts in the FreeCAD console or terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeCAD application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard FreeCAD interface (3D viewport, Tree View, Property View) must be visible, not a text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to create a dummy file
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'touch /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/box_model.FCStd' or copying a pre-made file to bypass the modeling task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Box primitive in FreeCAD's Part workbench. The dimensions must be exactly: Length = 60 mm, Width = 40 mm, and Height = 25 mm. The file must be saved as 'box_model.FCStd' in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory.
